# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| latest  | Yes       |

This is a portfolio and demonstration project. Only the latest commit on `main` is actively maintained.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Email: **architkonde19@gmail.com**

Include in your report:
- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce the issue
- Potential impact assessment
- Suggested mitigations (optional)

You will receive an acknowledgment within **5 business days**. If the issue is confirmed, a fix will be prioritised and a patched version released. You will be credited in the release notes unless you prefer to remain anonymous.

## Scope

| In scope | Out of scope |
|----------|--------------|
| Security bugs in this repository's code | Third-party library issues (report upstream) |
| Sensitive data exposure via the app | HuggingFace Spaces platform issues |
| Prompt injection via ticket content | OpenAI API security issues |

## Disclosure Policy

We follow a **90-day coordinated disclosure** model. After 90 days from the initial report, the vulnerability may be disclosed publicly regardless of fix status.
